qualitative_issues: Clustering too narrow — split Claude Code tooling into 2 clusters
Chen-Chen → Demo Day instead of Everything AI (person > keyword)
'Let me either...' classified as Action (exploratory language)

changes: Project annotations with key contacts (Chen-Chen, Raiya, Anar → EAI)
Added 'Let me...' and 'either...or' to non-action language signals
regressions: Anar feedback dual-classified as Action+Reference (person-association rule too broad)
Puffin classified as Clarify instead of Project Seed (too cautious)

changes: Feedback FROM person ≠ action TO person (explicit rule)
Project Seed vs Clarify distinction: creative concepts you understand → Seed, genuinely ambiguous → Clarify
improvements_over_v0: Broader clustering (all Claude Code items together)
'Let me either...' → Project Seed (deliberation, not action)
Puffin → Project Seed (creative concept, not Clarify)

changes: Tightened GitHub summary instruction: explicit 'no architecture details, no version history, no feature lists'
Reframed enrichment purpose: 'triage-level is this worth clicking' not 'summary'
improvements_over_v2: GitHub repo summaries stay within 1-3 sentences (AutoGen was 4 sentences + architecture detail in v2)
